task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the mountain operations safety brief.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/mountain_ops_brief.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses the vehicle parameters configuration menu in the Ground Control Station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl (or similar ground control software) is open with the 'Vehicle Setup' -> 'Parameters' screen visible.
The parameter 'TERRAIN_ENABLE' is visible in the parameter search/list and its value is set to 1.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the RTL_ALT and RTL_CLIMB_MIN parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The parameters 'RTL_ALT' and 'RTL_CLIMB_MIN' are visible in the parameter search/list and set to 20000 and 5000 respectively.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the RTL_SPEED and RTL_ALT_FINAL parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The parameters 'RTL_SPEED' and 'RTL_ALT_FINAL' are visible in the parameter search/list and set to 800 and 1000 respectively.
The parameter 'FS_GCS_ENABLE' is visible in the parameter search/list and its value is set to 1.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with a genuine Ground Control Station (like QGroundControl) or MAVLink console to set parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the actual GCS interface or using a MAVLink command line, rather than just editing a text file or script to fake the configuration.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually create or edit the verification result file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal or editor open showing the agent directly writing a JSON object to /tmp/task_result.json.

integrity.description: Agent read the actual brief file rather than hallucinating values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows the file /home/ga/Documents/QGC/mountain_ops_brief.txt being opened or printed to the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The operations brief is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/mountain_ops_brief.txt. The required parameter values are: TERRAIN_ENABLE=1, RTL_ALT=20000, RTL_CLIMB_MIN=5000, RTL_SPEED=800, RTL_ALT_FINAL=1000, FS_GCS_ENABLE=1.
